title: taraxacum montellii
intro: Taraxacum montellii, also known as the Montell's dandelion, is a plant species in the dandelion genus, characterized by its yellow flowers and jagged leaves. The medicinal properties of Taraxacum montellii include its anti-inflammatory and diuretic properties, which can help to reduce swelling and fluid retention in the body. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to support liver function, act as a natural laxative, and aid in the digestion of food. Taraxacum montellii is often used in herbal preparations, such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, to promote overall health and well-being.
